Bash(cd "F:\\地铁故障知识\\obsidian-knowledge-base" && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python << 'PYEOF'
from pathlib import Path
import re

WIKI_DIR = Path\("09-AI总结/wiki"\)

# Get all wiki files on disk \(excluding metadata\)
exclude = {"index.md", "log.md", "hot.md", "overview.md", "health-report.md", "lint-report.md"}
disk_files = {p.relative_to\(WIKI_DIR\) for p in WIKI_DIR.rglob\("*.md"\) if p.name not in exclude}

# Read index.md and extract wikilinks
index_content = \(WIKI_DIR / "index.md"\).read_text\(encoding="utf-8"\)
wikilinks = set\(re.findall\(r"\\[\\[\([^\\]]+\)\\]\\]", index_content\)\)
# Strip alias after |
index_links = {link.split\("|"\)[0] for link in wikilinks}

print\("=== Disk files ==="\)
for f in sorted\(disk_files\):
    print\(f"  {f.as_posix\(\)}"\)

print\("\\n=== Index entries ==="\)
for f in sorted\(index_links\):
    print\(f"  {f}"\)

# Compare: disk -> index
in_disk_not_index = disk_files - index_links
in_index_not_disk = index_links - disk_files

print\(f"\\n=== Comparison ==="\)
print\(f"Files on disk: {len\(disk_files\)}"\)
print\(f"Entries in index: {len\(index_links\)}"\)

if in_disk_not_index:
    print\(f"\\n⚠️  On disk but NOT in index \({len\(in_disk_not_index\)}\):"\)
    for f in sorted\(in_disk_not_index\):
        print\(f"  - {f.as_posix\(\)}"\)
else:
    print\(f"\\n✅ All disk files are in index"\)

if in_index_not_disk:
    print\(f"\\n⚠️  In index but NOT on disk \({len\(in_index_not_disk\)}\):"\)
    for f in sorted\(in_index_not_disk\):
        print\(f"  - {f}"\)
else:
    print\(f"\\n✅ All index entries exist on disk"\)
PYEOF)
